
```{r adjustcoins}

```



```{r rendercoins, results='asis'}

# coins <- list(
#   "Baseline" = coin_1,
#   "Scenario A" = coin_2,
#   "Scenario B" = coin_3
# )
# 
# for (nm in names(coins)) {
#   
#   cat(knitr::knit_child(
#     "child.Rmd",
#     envir = list2env(list(
#       coin = coins[[nm]],
#       coin_name = nm
#     )),
#     quiet = TRUE
#   ))
# }

```
